hypothesis: Add very long lag features: lag_84, lag_168 (half-year), lag_365 (yearly). Top M5 solutions heavily rely on yearly seasonality. lag_365 captures same-day-last-year sales which is a strong signal for seasonal items. lag_168 captures same-weekday 24 weeks ago. All other settings match best run (exp_0033, WRMSSE=0.94488) with num_leaves=256, max_depth=8, tweedie_variance_power=1.5.
